title: Speaking: Shopping and Asking Prices
description: Practice asking for prices and stating what item you want in a store.

blocks.title: Scene 1: Buying at the Market
blocks.context: You see a beautiful red bag (jhola), but you don't know the price. You want to ask the clerk and buy it.
blocks.goal: Ask how much the bag is using 'yah', and decide to buy it.
usefulPhrases: यह कितना है? (Yah kitna hai?) - How much is this?
यह पचास रुपये है। (Yah pachaas rupaye hai.) - It is 50 rupees. (Shopkeeper)
ठीक है, मुझे यह चाहिए। (Theek hai, mujhe yah chahiye.) - Okay, I want this.

blocks.title: Scene 2: Specifying an Item
blocks.context: The books are behind the counter. You want to point out the blue one.
blocks.goal: Use 'vah' (that) and colors to point it out.
usefulPhrases: वह क्या है? (Vah kya hai?) - What is that?
वह नीली किताब है। (Vah neeli kitaab hai.) - That is a blue book.
मुझे वह नीली किताब चाहिए। (Mujhe vah neeli kitaab chahiye.) - I want that blue book.

blocks.prompt: Practice saying numbers out loud! Count from 1 to 10 in Hindi. Record yourself or practice with a mirror.
hints: Make sure your vowels are clear. Keep 'a' long in 'Paanch' and 'Aath'.
